channel.title: Defense News (sample)
channel.description: Sample feed for offline scraper testing.

item.title: Navy tests new autonomous underwater drone for mine countermeasures
item.description: The Navy completed at-sea trials of an unmanned underwater vehicle using onboard AI for autonomous navigation.

item.title: Pentagon issues new policy directive on generative AI use
item.description: A new DoD directive sets guidance on the responsible use of generative artificial intelligence across the department.

item.title: Air Force awards machine learning contract for predictive maintenance
item.description: The service awarded a contract to apply machine learning algorithms to aircraft sustainment and maintenance forecasting.

item.title: Annual gala raises funds for veterans
item.description: A community fundraising dinner supporting local veterans and their families.
